title: Kaadhal Cassata Lyrics Kappal Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaadhal Cassata Lyrics from Kappal Tamil Movie
Singer(s): Sathya Prakash, Saindhavi, Yuki Praveen
Lyricist: Karky

basundhi paarvai
nee veesi sendraai.
Soan puppadi sorkkal
nee pesi sendraai.

Gulfi barby
gulfi mookkaale nee
en kannathai theendaadhe.

Candy crushin meedhu
aadayin viral un nenjiloda.
Mittaai kadaikkul
vandha erumbai pola
naanum unnil oorgiren.
ottu moththamaai
thithikkuraai nee
poovin raththamai
jamun-il moonaai
jamaththil aanaai.

aam.
Sirippi always chilling me
pirivu always killing me
yeah
un eyes-ai paarthadhaale
ice cube-aai aaneney.

pathaale inikkum
sweet stall-e.
parvayaal enaiyum
iluththaale.
thiththikkum hormone
unnai nenachaale.
paththikkum
ne vandhu anaichaale.

Chocolate sirppam ondru
muthtam kettu nirkkudhendru
nee ippa meedhu moikka
ayyam kollum eeyai pola
ennai paarkkiraai
enna nirkkiraai.
vaayai vaikkathaan
nee thudikkuraai.
Paalkova lavaai
pongattum vaa.

basundhi paarvai
nee veesi sendraai.
Soan puppadi sorkkal
nee pesi sendraai.

there is no one like you
may be there but I don't care.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaadhal Cassata?

The song is a romantic and peppy number that celebrates love with a playful tone.

Who are the singers of Kaadhal Cassata?

The song is sung by Saindhavi, Sathya Prakash, and Yuki Praveen.

Who composed the music for Kappal?

The music for the movie Kappal was composed by Natarajan Shankaran.

When was the song Kaadhal Cassata released?

The song was released on November 24, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Kappal, Kaadhal Cassata captures the essence of youthful romance with its lively and playful lyrics. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy melody make it a favorite for celebrations and parties. It conveys the sweetness of love with a light-hearted and joyous tone. The combination of Saindhavi, Sathya Prakash, and Yuki Praveen's vocals with Natarajan Shankaran's music creates an infectious energy that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the delightful charm of Kaadhal Cassata from the movie Kappal. With the enchanting voices of Saindhavi, Sathya Prakash, and Yuki Praveen, this song brings a peppy and romantic vibe. Natarajan Shankaran's music adds a unique flavor that makes it irresistible.
stanzaMeanings: Is love like a cassata sweet in the heart?
You cast a sweet look like basundi. You spoke words like soft sponge cake.
Gulfi Barbie, don't touch my cheeks with your nose.
Don't tease me by placing almond sweets everywhere.
You cast a sweet look like basundi.
Is love like a cassata sweet in the heart?
Your fingers play on me like candy crush. Like ants in a candy shop, I dissolve in you. You are sweet like jamun and colorful like flowers.
Is love like a cassata sweet in the heart?
Yes. Your smile always makes me happy, but separation always hurts me. Looking into your eyes, I turn into an ice cube.
The sweet stall is sweet just by looking. Your glance pulls me in. Thinking of you makes my hormones sweet. When you come close, I feel cared for.
Sweet stall. Pulls me in, thinking of you, feeling cared for.
You ask for a chocolate kiss, but hesitate like a fly. You look at me, but hesitate to speak. Let the milk sweet overflow.
Why, like burfi, are you killing me?
Love is like a cassata sweet in the heart.
Gulfi, don't touch my cheeks with your nose.
Don't tease me by placing almond sweets everywhere.
You cast a sweet look like basundi. You spoke words like soft sponge cake.
There is no one like you, maybe there is, but I don't care.
